---
agent: Instructions Generator
---
Take the information below and generate a [NAME].instructions.md file for it in the /.github/instructions directory. Geenrate an appropaite name for the [NAME] placeholder based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are clear, concise, and actionable, not too long, providing step-by-step guidance for the intended task or question. Use the tools at your disposal to research, gather information, and edit the instruction file as needed to ensure it is accurate and comprehensive. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file with a link to the new instruction file and a brief description of its purpose. If no information is provieded below prompot the user for the necessary details bout the layer of architecture or coding standards to document. If no inforamtion is provided, ask the user for the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document. The .md file should have frontmatter with a description property that informs copilot agents when to use the instructions. The content of the .md file should be a set of instructions for a specific task, such as coding standards for a particular layer of architecture, or best practices for a specific type of implementation. The instructions should be actionable and provide clear guidance for developers to follow when working on that aspect of the codebase.
